title: Bullish Acquires Equiniti in $4 Billion Tokenization Bet

title: Latest FINRA okay means Securitize becomes tokenized securities one stop shop
snippet: FINRA has granted the tokenization firm Securitize approval to custody tokenized securities as part of its regular broker dealer authorization.
